list.name: Changes
list.comment:
build: update production artifacts and transition to ESM configuration
- Update production build artifacts and manifests in the `.next` directory. - Transition Next.js configuration source from `next.config.js` to `next.config.mjs`. - Add pre-rendered HTML, RSC payloads, and metadata for `/b2b`, `/lab`, `/services`, `/store`, `/privacy`, and `/welcome` routes. - Update the application path routes manifest and build ID.

task.summary: Default task

config: cleanup and domain finalization
- Remove `memory` property from `vercel.json` to resolve Vercel build warnings. - Update Node.js engine requirement to `>=22.x` in `package.json` for broader environment compatibility. - Update `lastmod` dates in `public/sitemap.xml` to `2026-07-22`. - Update project implementation artifacts and walkthroughs to reflect deployment aliasing and final configuration tasks.

fix: enhance API stability and resolve CSP violations
- Add `manifest-src 'self' https://vercel.com` to Content-Security-Policy in `vercel.json` to resolve manifest blocking. - Set `trust proxy` in `server.ts` to ensure `express-rate-limit` functions correctly behind Vercel's proxy. - Enhance the global error handler to log detailed request context and return unique error IDs for easier debugging. - Add diagnostic logging to `/api/tax-lookup`, `/api/generate-quote`, and `/api/pos-sync-logs` routes. - Update the implementation plan to reflect resource blocking and API mitigation strategies.

feat: optimize canonical domain and add node server example
- Update canonical URL and Open Graph metadata to use `www.displaycellpros.com` in `index.html` and `robots.txt`. - Add a standalone Node.js server example in the `node/` directory, including configuration and documentation. - Update `OAuthDocumentationPanel` to include Vercel OAuth registration tasks and UI components. - Adjust Node.js engine requirement to `>=22.x` in `package-lock.json`. - Refresh implementation plans and walkthrough artifacts to reflect canonical domain optimization and API stability changes.

feat: migrate to Next.js App Router and integrate Auth0
- Port Vite + Express architecture to Next.js App Router. - Implement Auth0 for authentication and session management. - Migrate backend logic to `app/api/` routes (generate-quote, triage, tax-lookup, tickets). - Refactor frontend into modular components (`HomeView`, `B2BView`, `ServicesView`). - Update `package.json` dependencies and scripts for Next.js. - Remove legacy components and root configuration files in favor of the new `app/` structure.

feat: add core UI components and global layout wrapper
- Implement `LayoutWrapper` to manage global state for the AI widget and toast notifications. - Add `Navbar` and `Footer` components with responsive design and mobile menus. - Create `AIAssistantWidget` for interactive device triage and hardware diagnostic simulation. - Implement `StoreView` for product listings and `AuthLoadingOverlay` for authentication transitions. - Update root layout and page routes (Home, B2B, Services) to utilize the new modular component architecture.

migrate to Next.js App Router
- Remove legacy Vite frontend and Express backend architecture. - Delete Firebase configuration, custom deployment scripts, and GitHub Actions workflows. - Implement new `app/` directory structure with routes for `/lab`, `/privacy`, and `/store`. - Refactor hardware diagnostic and repair logic into Next.js page components. - Transition authentication toward an Auth0-based implementation.

chore: refactor middleware and update Tailwind configuration
- Update `middleware.ts` to use `NextResponse` and `NextRequest`, and refine the matcher to exclude static assets. - Add `postcss.config.js` and `tailwind.config.js` for project styling. - Remove legacy rewrites and function duration settings from `vercel.json`. - Add `@vercel/node`, `@vercel/oidc-aws-credentials-provider`, and `@tailwindcss/postcss` dependencies to `package.json`. - Fix default imports for `CacheManagement` and `TicketTemplatesPanel` in `app/lab/page.tsx`.

chore: refactor middleware and update Tailwind configuration
- Update `middleware.ts` to use `NextResponse` and `NextRequest`, and refine the matcher to exclude static assets. - Add `postcss.config.js` and `tailwind.config.js` for project styling. - Remove legacy rewrites and function duration settings from `vercel.json`. - Add `@vercel/node`, `@vercel/oidc-aws-credentials-provider`, and `@tailwindcss/postcss` dependencies to `package.json`. - Fix default imports for `CacheManagement` and `TicketTemplatesPanel` in `app/lab/page.tsx`.

refactor: enhance Auth0 integration and secure Lab portal
- Update `lib/auth0.ts` to use standardized environment variables for `issuerBaseURL` and `baseURL`. - Secure `app/lab/page.tsx` with automatic authentication redirects and integrated user session status. - Update `components/Navbar.tsx` to dynamically display user profile information and authentication actions (Login/Logout). - Standardize `app/api/tickets/route.ts` handlers to use `NextRequest`. - Clean up legacy mock authentication logic and update the project implementation plan.

refactor: enhance Auth0 integration and secure Lab portal
- Update `lib/auth0.ts` to use standardized environment variables for `issuerBaseURL` and `baseURL`. - Secure `app/lab/page.tsx` with automatic authentication redirects and integrated user session status. - Update `components/Navbar.tsx` to dynamically display user profile information and authentication actions (Login/Logout). - Standardize `app/api/tickets/route.ts` handlers to use `NextRequest`. - Clean up legacy mock authentication logic and update the project implementation plan.
build: update build manifests and static chunks

refactor: enhance Auth0 integration and secure Lab portal
- Update Auth0 configuration to use standardized environment variables for `issuerBaseURL` and `baseURL`. - Secure the `/lab` route with automatic authentication redirects and user session tracking. - Update the `Navbar` component to dynamically display user profiles and login/logout actions. - Standardize API ticket handlers to use `NextRequest`. - Update build diagnostics to the static-generation stage and include OpenTelemetry in server-side file tracing.
build: update site build artifacts

docs: update implementation plan for Auth0 "Quantum" integration
Align the project implementation plan with the modern Auth0 middleware proxy pattern and "Quantum" design aesthetic.
- Relocate the existing landing page to `/welcome`. - Replace the root page with the Auth0 Login Card dashboard. - Update `lib/auth0.ts` to use `Auth0Client` for zero-config initialization. - Introduce a middleware proxy (`proxy.ts`) for authentication handshakes. - Add new UI components: `LoginButton`, `LogoutButton`, and `Profile`. - Update the root layout to use the client-side `Auth0Provider`.

docs: update implementation plan for Auth0 "Quantum" integration
Align the project implementation plan with the modern Auth0 middleware proxy pattern and "Quantum" design aesthetic.
- Relocate the existing landing page to `/welcome`. - Replace the root page with the Auth0 Login Card dashboard. - Update `lib/auth0.ts` to use `Auth0Client` for zero-config initialization. - Introduce a middleware proxy (`proxy.ts`) for authentication handshakes. - Add new UI components: `LoginButton`, `LogoutButton`, and `Profile`. - Update the root layout to use the client-side `Auth0Provider`.

docs: update implementation plan for Auth0 "Quantum" integration
Align the project implementation plan with the modern Auth0 middleware proxy pattern and "Quantum" design aesthetic.
- Relocate the existing landing page to `/welcome`. - Replace the root page with the Auth0 Login Card dashboard. - Update `lib/auth0.ts` to use `Auth0Client` for zero-config initialization. - Introduce a middleware proxy (`proxy.ts`) for authentication handshakes. - Add new UI components: `LoginButton`, `LogoutButton`, and `Profile`. - Update the root layout to use the client-side `Auth0Provider`.

docs: update implementation plan for Auth0 "Quantum" integration
Align the project implementation plan with the modern Auth0 middleware proxy pattern and "Quantum" design aesthetic.
- Relocate the existing landing page to `/welcome`. - Replace the root page with the Auth0 Login Card dashboard. - Update `lib/auth0.ts` to use `Auth0Client` for zero-config initialization. - Introduce a middleware proxy (`proxy.ts`) for authentication handshakes. - Add new UI components: `LoginButton`, `LogoutButton`, and `Profile`. - Update the root layout to use the client-side `Auth0Provider`.

docs: update implementation plan for Auth0 "Quantum" integration
Align the project implementation plan with the modern Auth0 middleware proxy pattern and "Quantum" design aesthetic.
- Relocate the existing landing page to `/welcome`. - Replace the root page with the Auth0 Login Card dashboard. - Update `lib/auth0.ts` to use `Auth0Client` for zero-config initialization. - Introduce a middleware proxy (`proxy.ts`) for authentication handshakes. - Add new UI components: `LoginButton`, `LogoutButton`, and `Profile`. - Update the root layout to use the client-side `Auth0Provider`.

docs: update implementation plan for Auth0 "Quantum" integration
Align the project implementation plan with the modern Auth0 middleware proxy pattern and "Quantum" design aesthetic.
- Relocate the existing landing page to `/welcome`. - Replace the root page with the Auth0 Login Card dashboard. - Update `lib/auth0.ts` to use `Auth0Client` for zero-config initialization. - Introduce a middleware proxy (`proxy.ts`) for authentication handshakes. - Add new UI components: `LoginButton`, `LogoutButton`, and `Profile`. - Update the root layout to use the client-side `Auth0Provider`.
update build artifacts
update build artifacts

feat: initialize project scaffolding and core lab portal features
- Set up Next.js App Router structure with Auth0 integration and middleware proxying. - Implement AWS RDS PostgreSQL connection logic using IAM OIDC authentication. - Create a diagnostic Lab Portal including a USB hardware simulator, QR/barcode scanner, and Recharts-based telemetry visualizations. - Add an AI triage assistant widget and dynamic quote generation engine with Washington state tax calculations. - Implement specialized UI components for cache management, RDS diagnostics, and repair ticket templates. - Establish core API routes for hardware triage, tax lookup, and ticketing. - Add global styling, custom toast notifications, and responsive navigation components.

update device streaming cache and refactor build implementation plan
- Update `deviceStreaming.xml` with new device definitions for HONOR, OPPO, Xiaomi, and others. - Refactor implementation plan to focus on `src/` directory module resolution in `tsconfig.json` and `tailwind.config.js`. - Update IDE workspace settings and account configurations.

update device streaming cache and refactor build implementation plan
- Update `deviceStreaming.xml` with new device definitions for HONOR, OPPO, Xiaomi, and others. - Refactor implementation plan to focus on `src/` directory module resolution in `tsconfig.json` and `tailwind.config.js`. - Update IDE workspace settings and account configurations.

refactor: move app, components, and lib to src directory
- Move `app/`, `components/`, and `lib/` directories into a new `src/` folder. - Update import paths in `scripts/setup-db.ts` to point to `../src/lib/db`. - Regenerate Next.js build manifests and cache to reflect the updated project structure.
build: update production artifacts for technical lab and Auth0 integration
build update

config: update VCS settings and issue navigation for github-mcp-server
- Add issue navigation links for `github-mcp-server` supporting multiple formats (`#`, `(#)`, and `GH-`). - Map `github-mcp-server` directory to Git in VCS directory mappings. - Update IDE workspace metadata and task history.

config: update VCS settings and issue navigation for github-mcp-server
- Add issue navigation links for `github-mcp-server` supporting multiple formats (`#`, `(#)`, and `GH-`). - Map `github-mcp-server` directory to Git in VCS directory mappings. - Update IDE workspace metadata and task history.

build: add static artifacts for store page and charting components
- Implement the `/store` page static chunks, featuring a product grid for "Logistics & Supply" items. - Include charting library assets (Recharts) and associated state management logic (Redux, Immer) in the build output. - Update build manifests and global CSS with font-face definitions for Plus Jakarta Sans, JetBrains Mono, and Inter.

build: add static artifacts for store page and charting components
- Implement the `/store` page static chunks, featuring a product grid for "Logistics & Supply" items. - Include charting library assets (Recharts) and associated state management logic (Redux, Immer) in the build output. - Update build manifests and global CSS with font-face definitions for Plus Jakarta Sans, JetBrains Mono, and Inter.

build: update Next.js production build artifacts
- Regenerate build manifests and static chunks with a new build ID (`Fujph7tb_M8njXfdj8cLV`). - Update `app-build-manifest.json` and `app-paths-manifest.json` with reordered route definitions. - Refresh client reference manifests for various app routes including `/lab`, `/store`, and `/welcome`. - Add `/404` page entry to `pages-manifest.json`. - Update build trace logs.

build: update Next.js production build artifacts
- Regenerate build manifests and static chunks with a new build ID (`Fujph7tb_M8njXfdj8cLV`). - Update `app-build-manifest.json` and `app-paths-manifest.json` with reordered route definitions. - Refresh client reference manifests for various app routes including `/lab`, `/store`, and `/welcome`. - Add `/404` page entry to `pages-manifest.json`. - Update build trace logs.

build: update Next.js production build artifacts
- Regenerate build manifests and static chunks with a new build ID (`Fujph7tb_M8njXfdj8cLV`). - Update `app-build-manifest.json` and `app-paths-manifest.json` with reordered route definitions. - Refresh client reference manifests for various app routes including `/lab`, `/store`, and `/welcome`. - Add `/404` page entry to `pages-manifest.json`. - Update build trace logs.

feat: register service worker and update precache assets
- Add service worker registration script to `src/app/layout.tsx`. - Remove `/index.html` from the `ASSETS_TO_PRECACHE` list in `public/sw.js`.

cleanup: remove service worker and static assets
- Delete `sw.js` and its associated service worker caching logic. - Remove `favicon.svg`, `favicon.ico`, and the Google site verification HTML file. - Clean up `assets/.aistudio/.gitignore`.

build: add clean script to package.json
- Add `clean` script to remove `.next` and `out` build directories.

build: add clean script to package.json
- Add `clean` script to remove `.next` and `out` build directories.

config: initialize Next.js configuration and update TypeScript resolution
- Add `next.config.mjs` with default configuration. - Update `tsconfig.json` to include `"baseUrl": "."` for absolute module resolution. - Update IDE workspace metadata and regenerate Next.js build manifests and cache artifacts.

refactor: update component imports to use relative paths
- Replace `@/components/` path alias with relative paths in `src/app/b2b/page.tsx` and `src/app/lab/page.tsx`.

config: initialize Next.js configuration and refactor component imports
- Add `next.config.mjs` and update `tsconfig.json` to support absolute module resolution. - Replace `@/components/` path aliases with relative paths in `src/app/b2b/page.tsx` and `src/app/lab/page.tsx`. - Update IDE workspace metadata and regenerate Next.js build manifests and cache artifacts.

build: update Next.js production artifacts and clean up build manifests
- Regenerate core build manifests, including `app-build-manifest.json`, `build-manifest.json`, and `middleware-manifest.json`. - Update build IDs and chunk hashes across metadata files. - Clean up the `.next/server` directory by removing stale pre-rendered HTML, RSC payloads, and metadata files for app and page routes. - Update Node File Trace (`.nft.json`) manifests to reflect changes in module dependencies and resolution. - Refresh webpack production cache packs.

build: update production artifacts and transition to ESM configuration
- Update production build artifacts and manifests in the `.next` directory. - Transition Next.js configuration source from `next.config.js` to `next.config.mjs`. - Add pre-rendered HTML, RSC payloads, and metadata for `/b2b`, `/lab`, `/services`, `/store`, `/privacy`, and `/welcome` routes. - Update the application path routes manifest and build ID.

build: update production artifacts and transition to ESM configuration
- Update production build artifacts and manifests in the `.next` directory. - Transition Next.js configuration source from `next.config.js` to `next.config.mjs`. - Add pre-rendered HTML, RSC payloads, and metadata for `/b2b`, `/lab`, `/services`, `/store`, `/privacy`, and `/welcome` routes. - Update the application path routes manifest and build ID.

build: update production artifacts and transition to ESM configuration
- Update production build artifacts and manifests in the `.next` directory. - Transition Next.js configuration source from `next.config.js` to `next.config.mjs`. - Add pre-rendered HTML, RSC payloads, and metadata for `/b2b`, `/lab`, `/services`, `/store`, `/privacy`, and `/welcome` routes. - Update the application path routes manifest and build ID.

build: update production artifacts and transition to ESM configuration
- Update production build artifacts and manifests in the `.next` directory. - Transition Next.js configuration source from `next.config.js` to `next.config.mjs`. - Add pre-rendered HTML, RSC payloads, and metadata for `/b2b`, `/lab`, `/services`, `/store`, `/privacy`, and `/welcome` routes. - Update the application path routes manifest and build ID.

build: update production artifacts and transition to ESM configuration
- Update production build artifacts and manifests in the `.next` directory. - Transition Next.js configuration source from `next.config.js` to `next.config.mjs`. - Add pre-rendered HTML, RSC payloads, and metadata for `/b2b`, `/lab`, `/services`, `/store`, `/privacy`, and `/welcome` routes. - Update the application path routes manifest and build ID.

build: update production artifacts and transition to ESM configuration
- Update production build artifacts and manifests in the `.next` directory. - Transition Next.js configuration source from `next.config.js` to `next.config.mjs`. - Add pre-rendered HTML, RSC payloads, and metadata for `/b2b`, `/lab`, `/services`, `/store`, `/privacy`, and `/welcome` routes. - Update the application path routes manifest and build ID.

build: update production artifacts and transition to ESM configuration
- Update production build artifacts and manifests in the `.next` directory. - Transition Next.js configuration source from `next.config.js` to `next.config.mjs`. - Add pre-rendered HTML, RSC payloads, and metadata for `/b2b`, `/lab`, `/services`, `/store`, `/privacy`, and `/welcome` routes. - Update the application path routes manifest and build ID.

MESSAGE.value:
feat: add core UI components and global layout wrapper
- Implement `LayoutWrapper` to manage global state for the AI widget and toast notifications. - Add `Navbar` and `Footer` components with responsive design and mobile menus. - Create `AIAssistantWidget` for interactive device triage and hardware diagnostic simulation. - Implement `StoreView` for product listings and `AuthLoadingOverlay` for authentication transitions. - Update root layout and page routes (Home, B2B, Services) to utilize the new modular component architecture.

migrate to Next.js App Router
- Remove legacy Vite frontend and Express backend architecture. - Delete Firebase configuration, custom deployment scripts, and GitHub Actions workflows. - Implement new `app/` directory structure with routes for `/lab`, `/privacy`, and `/store`. - Refactor hardware diagnostic and repair logic into Next.js page components. - Transition authentication toward an Auth0-based implementation.

chore: refactor middleware and update Tailwind configuration
- Update `middleware.ts` to use `NextResponse` and `NextRequest`, and refine the matcher to exclude static assets. - Add `postcss.config.js` and `tailwind.config.js` for project styling. - Remove legacy rewrites and function duration settings from `vercel.json`. - Add `@vercel/node`, `@vercel/oidc-aws-credentials-provider`, and `@tailwindcss/postcss` dependencies to `package.json`. - Fix default imports for `CacheManagement` and `TicketTemplatesPanel` in `app/lab/page.tsx`.

refactor: enhance Auth0 integration and secure Lab portal
- Update `lib/auth0.ts` to use standardized environment variables for `issuerBaseURL` and `baseURL`. - Secure `app/lab/page.tsx` with automatic authentication redirects and integrated user session status. - Update `components/Navbar.tsx` to dynamically display user profile information and authentication actions (Login/Logout). - Standardize `app/api/tickets/route.ts` handlers to use `NextRequest`. - Clean up legacy mock authentication logic and update the project implementation plan.
build: update build manifests and static chunks

refactor: enhance Auth0 integration and secure Lab portal
- Update Auth0 configuration to use standardized environment variables for `issuerBaseURL` and `baseURL`. - Secure the `/lab` route with automatic authentication redirects and user session tracking. - Update the `Navbar` component to dynamically display user profiles and login/logout actions. - Standardize API ticket handlers to use `NextRequest`. - Update build diagnostics to the static-generation stage and include OpenTelemetry in server-side file tracing.
build: update site build artifacts

docs: update implementation plan for Auth0 "Quantum" integration
Align the project implementation plan with the modern Auth0 middleware proxy pattern and "Quantum" design aesthetic.
- Relocate the existing landing page to `/welcome`. - Replace the root page with the Auth0 Login Card dashboard. - Update `lib/auth0.ts` to use `Auth0Client` for zero-config initialization. - Introduce a middleware proxy (`proxy.ts`) for authentication handshakes. - Add new UI components: `LoginButton`, `LogoutButton`, and `Profile`. - Update the root layout to use the client-side `Auth0Provider`.
update build artifacts

feat: initialize project scaffolding and core lab portal features
- Set up Next.js App Router structure with Auth0 integration and middleware proxying. - Implement AWS RDS PostgreSQL connection logic using IAM OIDC authentication. - Create a diagnostic Lab Portal including a USB hardware simulator, QR/barcode scanner, and Recharts-based telemetry visualizations. - Add an AI triage assistant widget and dynamic quote generation engine with Washington state tax calculations. - Implement specialized UI components for cache management, RDS diagnostics, and repair ticket templates. - Establish core API routes for hardware triage, tax lookup, and ticketing. - Add global styling, custom toast notifications, and responsive navigation components.

update device streaming cache and refactor build implementation plan
- Update `deviceStreaming.xml` with new device definitions for HONOR, OPPO, Xiaomi, and others. - Refactor implementation plan to focus on `src/` directory module resolution in `tsconfig.json` and `tailwind.config.js`. - Update IDE workspace settings and account configurations.

refactor: move app, components, and lib to src directory
- Move `app/`, `components/`, and `lib/` directories into a new `src/` folder. - Update import paths in `scripts/setup-db.ts` to point to `../src/lib/db`. - Regenerate Next.js build manifests and cache to reflect the updated project structure.
build: update production artifacts for technical lab and Auth0 integration
build update

config: update VCS settings and issue navigation for github-mcp-server
- Add issue navigation links for `github-mcp-server` supporting multiple formats (`#`, `(#)`, and `GH-`). - Map `github-mcp-server` directory to Git in VCS directory mappings. - Update IDE workspace metadata and task history.

build: add static artifacts for store page and charting components
- Implement the `/store` page static chunks, featuring a product grid for "Logistics & Supply" items. - Include charting library assets (Recharts) and associated state management logic (Redux, Immer) in the build output. - Update build manifests and global CSS with font-face definitions for Plus Jakarta Sans, JetBrains Mono, and Inter.

build: update Next.js production build artifacts
- Regenerate build manifests and static chunks with a new build ID (`Fujph7tb_M8njXfdj8cLV`). - Update `app-build-manifest.json` and `app-paths-manifest.json` with reordered route definitions. - Refresh client reference manifests for various app routes including `/lab`, `/store`, and `/welcome`. - Add `/404` page entry to `pages-manifest.json`. - Update build trace logs.

feat: register service worker and update precache assets
- Add service worker registration script to `src/app/layout.tsx`. - Remove `/index.html` from the `ASSETS_TO_PRECACHE` list in `public/sw.js`.

cleanup: remove service worker and static assets
- Delete `sw.js` and its associated service worker caching logic. - Remove `favicon.svg`, `favicon.ico`, and the Google site verification HTML file. - Clean up `assets/.aistudio/.gitignore`.

build: add clean script to package.json
- Add `clean` script to remove `.next` and `out` build directories.

config: initialize Next.js configuration and update TypeScript resolution
- Add `next.config.mjs` with default configuration. - Update `tsconfig.json` to include `"baseUrl": "."` for absolute module resolution. - Update IDE workspace metadata and regenerate Next.js build manifests and cache artifacts.

refactor: update component imports to use relative paths
- Replace `@/components/` path alias with relative paths in `src/app/b2b/page.tsx` and `src/app/lab/page.tsx`.

config: initialize Next.js configuration and refactor component imports
- Add `next.config.mjs` and update `tsconfig.json` to support absolute module resolution. - Replace `@/components/` path aliases with relative paths in `src/app/b2b/page.tsx` and `src/app/lab/page.tsx`. - Update IDE workspace metadata and regenerate Next.js build manifests and cache artifacts.

build: update Next.js production artifacts and clean up build manifests
- Regenerate core build manifests, including `app-build-manifest.json`, `build-manifest.json`, and `middleware-manifest.json`. - Update build IDs and chunk hashes across metadata files. - Clean up the `.next/server` directory by removing stale pre-rendered HTML, RSC payloads, and metadata files for app and page routes. - Update Node File Trace (`.nft.json`) manifests to reflect changes in module dependencies and resolution. - Refresh webpack production cache packs.

build: update production artifacts and transition to ESM configuration
- Update production build artifacts and manifests in the `.next` directory. - Transition Next.js configuration source from `next.config.js` to `next.config.mjs`. - Add pre-rendered HTML, RSC payloads, and metadata for `/b2b`, `/lab`, `/services`, `/store`, `/privacy`, and `/welcome` routes. - Update the application path routes manifest and build ID.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
build: update production artifacts and transition to ESM configuration
- Update production build artifacts and manifests in the `.next` directory. - Transition Next.js configuration source from `next.config.js` to `next.config.mjs`. - Add pre-rendered HTML, RSC payloads, and metadata for `/b2b`, `/lab`, `/services`, `/store`, `/privacy`, and `/welcome` routes. - Update the application path routes manifest and build ID.
